---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **bun version**: (`bun --version`)
- **agents-hive version**: (`hive version`)
- **Agent CLIs installed**: (claude / gemini / codex — include versions)

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what happened.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
hive init /tmp/test
hive project create foo claude "test"
# ...
```

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (screenshots, logs, etc.)
